summary: Bug fix verification complete - All 5 bugs from handoff summary verified as fixed: React hook order, View Report redirect, Score/Duration display, Issues tab mapping, Rerun Test autorun.

regression_results.notes: Ran targeted bug fix verification tests. All bug fixes confirmed working.

react_hook_order.description: TestResultPage.tsx loads without React hook errors - page renders correctly with all tabs and buttons

view_report_redirect.description: View Report correctly redirects to test result page with testId from sync response

score_display_tests_page.description: Score displays correctly as 'Score: 85%' in Results column from results.webMetrics.performanceScore/seoScore

duration_display_tests_page.description: Duration displays correctly as '<1s' format in Duration column

score_display_history_page.description: Score displays correctly as '85%' (green) in Score column from results.webMetrics data

duration_display_history_page.description: Duration displays correctly as '<1s' in Duration column

seo_tab_score_categories.description: SEO tab shows score (74), categories (Meta Tags 52, Headings 85, Content 76, Technical 80), and sub-tabs

issues_tab_seo_analysis.description: Issues sub-tab displays actual issues from seoAnalysis.issues (e.g., 'META TAGS - Missing meta description')

rerun_test_autorun.description: Rerun Test button navigates to homepage with URL params (url, testType, deviceType, autorun=true) and automatically triggers test execution

features_verified.login_flow: PASS - Login modal opens with test@example.com / TestPass123!
features_verified.dashboard_overview: PASS - Welcome back message, stats cards, Recent Tests, Quick Actions visible
features_verified.tests_page: PASS - Tests heading, search filter, table with Score (85%) and Duration (<1s)
features_verified.test_result_page: PASS - Back button, Complete status, Rerun Test/Share/Export PDF buttons, tabs (Overview, Performance, SEO, Accessibility)
features_verified.test_result_seo_tab: PASS - SEO Score 74, categories, sub-tabs (Overview, Detailed Analysis, Recommendations, Issues)
features_verified.test_result_issues_tab: PASS - Shows actual SEO issues from seoAnalysis
features_verified.history_page: PASS - Test History heading, Export CSV, Score 85%, Duration <1s, filters
features_verified.scheduled_tests_modal: PASS - New Schedule modal with Schedule Name, Website URL, Test Type, Device, Frequency fields
features_verified.analytics_page: PASS - Analytics & Reports heading, Refresh, CSV/PDF export, Performance Trends chart, metrics cards

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified. Dashboard tests updated with more resilient login helper using networkidle wait and placeholder-based input selectors. Test for Rerun Test autorun functionality added. All tests passing when Cloudflare allows access.
